turns.assistantContent: The boundary check flags `mkdir` in all hook files — `compaction-handler.ts`, `chat-message-handler.ts`, `text-complete-handler.ts`, `event-handler.ts`, and now mine. This is a pre-existing issue across the codebase. Let me verify what the boundary script checks.
